one_time_description: Wood Mountain Legacy Trust specific claims settlement with Government of Canada for $50,000,000 total; $3,780,000 recorded as revenue in 2020 fiscal year with per capita distribution of $2,595,000 to band members
economic_notes: First Nation holds 8.3% interest in Keseechiwan Holdings LP valued at $60,000. Specific claims settlement of $50,000,000 with Government of Canada finalized; $49,358,357 deposited into Wood Mountain Legacy Trust on June 2, 2020. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event with uncertain economic impact.
notes: Major one-time specific claims settlement of $50M with Canada; $3.78M recorded as revenue in FY2020 with $2.595M per capita distribution to members and $1.185M remaining in deferred revenue. Short-term line of credit of $2,595,392 with RBC was used to advance per capita distribution pending settlement deposit; paid in full June 3, 2020. Trust funds held by federal government ($157,722) excluded from consolidated financial statements per Note 4. No schedule of remuneration provided. expenses_housing mapped to Community Development; expenses_administration mapped to Indian Government Support; expenses_infrastructure mapped to Land Management. Current liabilities include short-term financing $2,595,392 + accounts payable $196,169 = $2,791,561; deferred revenue includes unexpended funds $27,956 + deferred revenue $1,701,041 = $1,728,997. Historical accounting records gap noted for FY2004-2006. OSR calculation includes Wood Mountain Legacy Trust revenue and other non-government sources totaling approximately $3,239,253.
